content: For my personal reference. Will need to change this
suggestion for the FAQ - explanation of tentacle mechanics, given that they're a bit obfuscated and Aqueor is often recommended to new players

You guys *need* more mods. Anni grew the game very much which is very much appreciated but also came the backlash of having more people to moderate. 

Mods that are more active part of a community and can reason out situations without doling punishment without proper warning or appeal. Too quick on being judge, jury and executioner. Places I've seen as big as this have a strike, warning system and have atleast 8 mods covering the timezones.

if you guys want to debate how a mod should do their job, you should do it in <#1400750050208125010>
If there's an issue with someone breaking the rule, dm / ping mod.
If you have something to suggest to mod, type it here. Right now I don't see suggestions
But still doesn’t address the core issue

<@633215996508766229> <@1131790839291596841> <@&1435824962945421363> 
At current, it is from my understanding that a user would get a warning first with the appropriate wrong doing they commit. 2 strikes would be a mute the duration from 1 day to 1 week up to a moderator discretion. And 3 rd strike will be Perma banned/kicked from server. 

However after seeing that there were inconsistent usage of the three strikes steps system for different people and different cases I wish to clarify and ask for offical writing: 
Just to clarify does ALL infraction wrong doing apply under the 3 strikes steps system? 


It is from my current understanding the only system we have is the three strikes system. Which does NOT seperate serious/insane takes such as sexual harassment of a minors in the case of xxxgirlkisserxxx (Glutton) wrong doings from more minors one. Like saying a swear in the case of Arisu. And while it was acceptable for past morimens server as the server grows and with recent sighting of inconsistent rule application of the 3 strikes system in Glutton case and the lack of it in the case of Arisu. I would like some clarification and official guidelines and statements from server managements we can all follow and to clarify any questions and dubious actions by some members of the server. What are the protocols and steps for more serious violations such as grooming, sexual harassment, death threats vs 18+ content, slurs, swears, etc?

I would also like take this opportunity to add an overdue suggestion: that we add rules and guidelines with a more decisive action forward more serious violations and crimes. Alongside a bot that catches and record all deleted messages where mods and management can see ALL deleted messages to better administrate the servers and understand the situation and handle situations with more clarity. 

As The two most obvious problems with 3 strike system is that 1: extreme instances like sexual harassment and role play especially to a minor aren't given a severe enough punishment and 2: long time regulars are disproportionately punished. assuming strikes last indefinitely and strikes are applied consistently, long time regulars can accumulate strikes and eventually be in danger of being banned despite having a history of generally good behaviour.

 These are 2 very obvious faults with the current system, and there's 2 very obvious examples I am concerned for for this 3 strike system: the proportion of punishment does not apply equal to their severity: Glutton being a pedophile, especially to a minor at that, in the past I had operate under the 3 strike system out of faith but now seeing a well-liked and very active community member being in danger of a ban, largely because of a joke report and whose the 3 strikes system was improperly apply to (Arisu) I would like to open a discussion into guidelines and protocols for server violations and their severity.
I want a better system that punish user base on severity and to actually get that system IN WRITING from DEV THEMSELVES and a bot to catch deleted comments
Oh and to un mute Arisu
